title: geranium australe
intro: Geranium australe, also known as the Australian geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family and is native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Geranium australe include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate menstrual cramps, among others. In herbal preparations, Geranium australe is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
